title: orobanche ramosa var. mutelii
intro: Orobanche ramosa var. mutelii is a parasitic plant species, specifically a holoparasite, that belongs to the Orobanchaceae family and is native to certain regions in Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Orobanche ramosa var. mutelii are believed to include improving cardiovascular health, reducing oxidative stress, and exhibiting immunomodulatory and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally to harness its potential health benefits.
